name_cn:
➫ SPEEDY 20 Series #M45957# Uninspected Version
🔘Size: 20*13*12cm
As a classic flagship series of the Speedy family, the Speedy series has always been a favorite among enthusiasts.
The brand new Speedy series has a stunning look, and the detachable wide shoulder strap design gives it a novel and chic appearance!
As a new member of the Speedy family, this size is even more perfect!
Another best-seller that is constantly out of stock, with an even more overflowing appearance.
Compared to the Nano size, it is more suitable for daily use.
Must-have item, absolutely gorgeous!!
